name: Grappling Hook - Phighting
description:
⤦ || Catchin' you in Redcliff Wrangler territory || ⤤

"Let's try a new personality layout!!" I said, "It'll have less tokens!!" I said. And then BOOM, 2427 permanent tokens! I'm so good at this, you guys, I know what I'm doing, trust me! Totally...

Anywho, I know a bot like this already exists, but I wanted to make my own and honestly, it was pretty fun, I enjoyed making the intro, I haven't genuinely written in a little while.

Also, I am SO sorry if Grappling Hook misgenders themself, I tried really REALLY hard to get them not to but they still do sometimes, I can't control it💔

Enjoy!! Hopefully the bot doesn't implode because of me and my weird obsession with adding all the lore I can into bots.

CWs/Things included in this bot:

- Death In the Family spoilers maybe..? The intro is very loosely inspired by the encounter with sword in the comic.

Bot Request Google Form
creator: SillyImbecile
